resources.string:
Professional Summary:
 Innovative engineer skilled in ECE and software development, with expertise in Python, Java, Kotlin, and machine learning.
Averaged in IoT, AI projects, and Android app development. Experienced project leader with hands-on internship and project work.
 Averaged analytical skills in stock market analysis. Committed to continuous learning and creating impactful technological solutions.

EDUCATION:
 1. B. Tech ECE (AI Cybernetics)-VIT Bhopal University
  GPA: 8.12/10.
 2. Class XII (CBSE)-RPS School Makanpur
  GPA: 85.6%.
 3. Class X (CBSE)-S.A.M Secondary School
  GPA: 88.6%.

Skills:
  ECE- Analog & Digital Circuits, Electronic Devices, MATLAB(Basic).
  CS- Python, Java, Kotlin, Room Database Library, DSA(Basic).
  AI- Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Computer Vision, Neural Networks, AI Libraries.
  IOT- RP Pico, Arduino Microcontroller (Basic).
  Finance- Stock’s Fundamental & Technical analyses.
  App Dev- Android development Using Java & Kotlin.

EXPERIENCE:
 1. Intern, Bharat Heavy Electricals Limited
  Project-Excitation System of AC Generators
  Duration- 2 Month (Oct 23 to Nov 23)
  Description- This project involved understanding and implementing various types of excitation systems to ensure reliable
 and efficient operation of power plant generators.
  Key Responsibilities: Analyzed components and types of excitation systems, participated in the design and
 implementation and collaborated with senior engineers on advanced excitation system concepts.
  Working Role- The Control Equipment Engineering (CEE) Department, assisting with engineering and
 implementation tasks, conducting research, and preparing reports.
  Working Technology- Excitation Systems (DC, AC, Static), engineering tools, and simulation software.
  Report Link https://drive.google.com/file/d/15OUD0_Hip1K8fTrEx77Xz1AsK3c_DU_j/view?usp=drive_link
  Certificate Link- https://drive.google.com/file/d/1jI8tgP_cTIVLq9tM8Lgm7k19BWDTGDa3/view?usp=drive_link

PROJECTS:
 1. Bluetooth Controlled Robotic Vehicle (July 22– Oct-22)
  Description- Developed an All-terrain robotic vehicle controlled via Bluetooth using a mobile app for directional
 movements and task execution.
  Link- https://drive.google.com/file/d/1DbuBBzNcwjg7X43vDvSmVQ7VM7W3x9fw/view?usp=drive_link
 
 2. Solar Wireless Electric Vehicle Charging System (Dec 22 – Feb 23)
  Description- Designed a solar-powered system for wireless electric vehicle charging.
  Link- https://drive.google.com/file/d/19M1FZmD4t7ViNnPoWzz2MH-i4tArr3-6/view?usp=drive_link
 
 Details-
  Technology: Semiconductor device-based circuit and IOT
  Team Project: 4 members
  Role: As a Circuit Designer and As a Team Leader
 
 3. AI Chat Bot Project (Luna) (Jun 23 – Jun 23)
  Description: Developed a chatbot that integrates Gemini API for generating responses fetches thelatest news, and
 provides a music playlist
  Link- https://drive.google.com/file/d/18N6_rIu8r1PftSGIor2ZZVPMq5VcJiDm/view?usp=drive_link
 Details-
  Technology: Python, Gemini API, News API, RESTful APIs
  Role: Lead Developer, responsible for integrating APIs, writing the main script

COURSE CERTIFICATE:
 1. Machine Learning with Python- https://drive.google.com/file/d/1ILBt-bDQi0me4efHxdkR-cCPgGwLcuXX/view
 2. Deep Learning & Neural Networks with Keras-https://drive.google.com/file/d/1b1CbwfQxQnwPPZqsAzx8fUoG5Z_KkBIF/view
 3. Computer Vision and Image Processing- https://drive.google.com/file/d/11J61vTGntgzLpH05DK-ZG056yWCxaFcV/view
 4. Deep Neural Networks with PyTorch-https://drive.google.com/file/d/1LuduuXH9gNimboCO9LTECLTtcnqIxByr/view
 5. Deep Learning Models with TensorFlow-https://drive.google.com/file/d/1drDRdkEjlB25JHw71IZ7ByRMAz6gRO_c/view
 6. Java for Android-https://drive.google.com/file/d/1YaKJ4GQYqSINvVaE5y6TT6rNbhHM1395/view

ADDITIONAL DETAIL:
 1. Profession- Engineer
 2. Roles And Responsibilities-
  Team Leader for project work.
  Program Coordinator in School's cultural Fest.
 3. Extracurricular-
  Awareness about many geopolitical views & Civics.
 4. Hobbies-
  Geographical and Political News Reading
  Cycling, Planting, Playing Games.
 5. Languages- Hindi, English
